description: "Append a trace log entry"

Update the repository log files from the current chat context.

Append a concise trace entry to this file under `.wiki/orchestrator/`:
- `Learning-Backlog.md`

Use the current conversation and selected text, if any, to infer the event being logged. Preserve existing content and append a timestamped entry at the end of the file. Capture the smallest useful detail that will help reconstruct the reasoning later.
